shared_properties: The portrait keeps the 64x64px frame, fur hood silhouette, and beard outline established by art_000001.
Core palette fields remain fixed at primary #111111, background #000000, and accent #FFFFFF.
The upper-left HUD anchor remains unchanged so portrait swaps do not disturb interface layout.
differences: Eyebrows angle downward and the mouth tightens to communicate high blizzard pressure and urgent decision making.
Snow flecks and a stronger white cheek rim raise contrast during severe whiteout moments.
Frame cadence increases to 4fps so the alert state feels more active than the calm loop.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the winter survival loop, queue-memory mechanic, building roster, and 1920x1080 Bevy target.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_player_jarl
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the jarl portrait silhouette, fur hood shape, and beard readability in a compact HUD footprint.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the monochrome blizzard mood, Viking settlement silhouettes, and snow density targets.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: TextureAtlas-backed HUD portrait sprite that swaps in when blizzard intensity and event pressure spike.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/art_000002.png with the portrait atlas set and switch to it during alert and crisis states.
runtime_notes: Trigger this atlas when whiteout intensity exceeds the severe threshold or a crisis popup enters focus.
Keep the pivot aligned with art_000001 so only the expression changes when the alert state appears.
Use authored snow flecks in the atlas frames instead of runtime particles to keep UI capture deterministic.

context.usage: Escalated portrait state shown during heavy whiteout and crisis events so the player can read urgency instantly.

shape.silhouette: Aligned hooded bust with narrowed eyes, brighter frost edge, and a tenser beard contour.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 256x64px with 4 frames of 64x64px and 0px spacing.
The portrait alignment matches art_000001 so atlas swaps do not shift the HUD anchor.
Snow flecks and brow tension remain readable without obscuring the eye line or beard silhouette.
